title: Earache in Teachers: 11 Herbal Creams for Relief
description: Gaultheria procumbens creams are a natural remedy used to help relieve earache. The creams contain a compound called methyl salicylate, which is similar to aspirin, a common pain reliever. Methyl salicylate helps to reduce swelling and ease pain in the affected area. Gaultheria procumbens also contains other constituents like salicylic acid, which has anti-inflammatory properties, and volatile oils that may help to numb the area and provide quick relief.
